task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Urban Loft in Portland OR (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $895000.00 and wholesale is $716000.00. Product features: 2-bedroom industrial loft with high ceilings and city views in Pearl District. Reference: https://www.windermere.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Urban Loft in Portland OR. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Urban Loft in Portland OR. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
